features.name: unpacked struct with bit-typed members
features.description: Code should include an unpacked struct declaration with bit-typed members declared inside the struct body
features.snippet: struct { bit [3:0] m_lo; bit [3:0] m_hi; } s;

features.name: unpacked struct member default value initialization
features.description: Code should include an unpacked struct with a member that has a default value assignment using the equals sign
